subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Good to hear from you — I remember our conversation at the conference and I'm open to exploring how we might work together.

I'm available for a 30-minute call next week on Wednesday or Friday, ideally between 10:00–12:00 or 14:00–16:00 (UTC). Let me know what works and I'll get something on the calendar.

As for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I can't share internal contact information directly. After our initial discussion, if a senior-level technical conversation makes sense, I'll be happy to coordinate the right introductions from our side.

Talk soon.

Best regards
